titel: Enhanced medical expertise in municipal healthcare.
html:
The proposal suggests an amendment to the Health and Medical Care Act (2017:30) that would allow municipalities to hire physicians for activities related to municipal health and medical care services. Furthermore, the proposal suggests that the Health and Medical Care Act should include a provision authorizing the government or a government agency to issue regulations regarding the design and content of agreements for physician involvement.

The proposed amendment is scheduled to come into effect on August 1, 2026.

Proposed Parliamentary Decision

Prop. 2025/26:216

Government's proposal: The Parliament adopts the government's proposal for an amendment to the Health and Medical Care Act (2017:30). 3

Prop. 2025/26:216 4
tldr: Municipalities should be able to hire doctors to improve healthcare services. The proposal involves new regulations in the law that would allow municipal healthcare services to employ doctors in their work.
lattlast:
The government has proposed a change to the law regarding healthcare. This means that municipalities, which are responsible for much of the care provided in people's homes, will be given the right to hire doctors for their services.

The purpose of this change is to strengthen the medical expertise within municipal care. To ensure this works effectively, the government or another authority will determine the exact nature of the agreements with the doctors and what they will include.

If the parliament votes in favor of the proposal, the new rules will come into effect on August 1, 2026. This is part of a larger effort to improve healthcare for those living in municipalities.
